user.title: Instance basics
user.description: Choose a name and target lights (single lights and/or light groups). On first setup, set integration-wide parallel service calls. Recommended default is {default_max_parallel_calls}: it is fast without overloading hubs/APIs. If calls fail or lights lag, reduce this value (Tuya and some Zigbee bridges can throttle).

device.title: ZHA remote
device.description: Select the Zigbee button/remote device from the ZHA integration.

capture.title: Capture button press
capture.description: Click Submit, then press the desired physical button on {device}.

gestures.title: Gesture actions
gestures.description: This remote supports extra gestures. Choose what each supported gesture should do for this controller. Select Do nothing to ignore a gesture for this entry.

capture_optional.title: Capture gesture action
capture_optional.description: Click Submit, then perform the {gesture} on {device}. Turn on Skip if you do not want to use this gesture for this entry.

data.skip_capture: Skip this gesture for this entry

gesture_targets.title: Map optional gestures
gesture_targets.description: Choose which step each captured gesture should jump to. Off is always available.

steps_count.title: Brightness steps
steps_count.description: Off is always included as the first step. Choose how many "On" steps you want.

steps.title: Configure steps
steps.description: Define a label, brightness, and mode for each On step. Mode-specific fields are shown on the next page.

steps_details.title: Configure step details
steps_details.description: Configure mode-specific fields for Step {step} of {on_steps}. White & temperature shows only temperature. Colour shows only colour fields.

probe_device_gesture.title: Check gesture support
probe_device_gesture.description: Click Submit, then try a {gesture} on {device}. If this remote does not support that gesture, turn on the checkbox and submit to continue.

data.gesture_not_supported: This remote does not support this gesture

error.no_press: No button press detected. Click Submit again, then press the button.
error.not_zha_device: The selected device is not a ZHA device.
error.invalid_event: The captured event did not include enough data to identify the button.
error.invalid_step_count: Choose a number of steps between 1 and 8.
error.invalid_max_parallel_calls: Choose a parallel call count between 1 and 20.
error.target_required: Select at least one target light.
error.invalid_color: Enter a valid colour (picker value or #RRGGBB hex).
error.duplicate_gesture: That gesture matches a button event already used by this controller. Capture a different gesture or skip it.
error.invalid_gesture_target: Choose Do nothing, Off, or one of the configured steps.

init.title: Edit controller
init.description: Update target lights, button device, brightness steps, and integration-wide parallel service calls. Recommended default is {default_max_parallel_calls}; lower it if you see Tuya/Zigbee throttling or intermittent apply failures.

capture.title: Capture button press
capture.description: Click Submit, then press the desired physical button on {device}.

gestures.title: Gesture actions
gestures.description: Choose what each supported gesture should do for this controller. Select Do nothing to ignore a gesture, or enable recapture to bind that gesture again for this entry.

capture_optional.title: Capture gesture action
capture_optional.description: Click Submit, then perform the {gesture} on {device}. Turn on Skip if you do not want to use this gesture for this entry.

data.skip_capture: Skip this gesture for this entry

gesture_targets.title: Map optional gestures
gesture_targets.description: Choose which step each captured gesture should jump to. Off is always available.

steps.title: Configure steps
steps.description: Define a label, brightness, and mode for each On step. Mode-specific fields are shown on the next page.

steps_details.title: Configure step details
steps_details.description: Configure mode-specific fields for Step {step} of {on_steps}. White & temperature shows only temperature. Colour shows only colour fields.

probe_device_gesture.title: Check gesture support
probe_device_gesture.description: Click Submit, then try a {gesture} on {device}. If this remote does not support that gesture, turn on the checkbox and submit to continue.

data.gesture_not_supported: This remote does not support this gesture

error.no_press: No button press detected. Click Submit again, then press the button.
error.not_zha_device: The selected device is not a ZHA device.
error.invalid_event: The captured event did not include enough data to identify the button.
error.invalid_step_count: Choose a number of steps between 1 and 8.
error.invalid_max_parallel_calls: Choose a parallel call count between 1 and 20.
error.target_required: Select at least one target light.
error.invalid_color: Enter a valid colour (picker value or #RRGGBB hex).
error.duplicate_gesture: That gesture matches a button event already used by this controller. Capture a different gesture or skip it.
error.invalid_gesture_target: Choose Do nothing, Off, or one of the configured steps.
